历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 27045 → 14158 → 14632 → 27996. In 2023, there was a significant forward shift, and in 2024 it remained roughly stable. In 2025, due to adjustments in the new college entrance examination model, the ranking shifted significantly backward to about 27996. The fluctuations in the past two years have been severe, with the 2025 baseline at approximately 27996. The provincial science enrollment plan was 105 in 2022 → 92 in 2023 → 87 in 2024 → 87 in 2025, showing a gradual slight reduction trend. In 2026, the physics category plan is 49 and the medical category plan is 16 (both under the science group), totaling 65, a reduction of about 25% compared to 87 in 2025. The enrollment reduction is significant, easing competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 46th on the Soft Science main list (2026), with stable rankings in the 40–46 range in recent years, placing it at the upper-middle level nationally. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving a campus safety incident where a male student maliciously used female classmates' photos, which may have a certain negative impact on application psychology. Douyin popularity ranks 46th (relatively hot), with high short video exposure, reflecting moderate application attention. No records of admission gaps or interruptions. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Physical Education received A- and Pharmacy received A-, with a total of 2 disciplines at A- or above, which have average relevance to enrollment majors. Materials Science and Engineering, Computer Science, and other disciplines, though not rated A-, are key development areas for the university.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation remain highly recommended, matching Soochow University's advantageous engineering fields. Clinical Medicine and Stomatology have stable recommendation popularity. In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam takers in the province is approximately 535,000, a significant increase from about 463,000 in 2025, expanding the competition base. Soochow University is located in Suzhou, Jiangsu, in the economically developed Yangtze River Delta region, offering some cross-provincial appeal to candidates from the southwest. The university's enrollment proportion in Sichuan is about 2%–4%, which is at a lower-middle level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline of a significant backward shift in 2025 rankings, the notable reduction in 2026 enrollment plans (easing competition), the increase in the number of provincial exam takers (intensifying competition), and the somewhat negative reputation, the easing effect of enrollment reduction slightly outweighs the competitive effect of increased candidates. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will shift forward compared to 2025 (smaller number). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 23798, with a range of 23298–24298.

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 苏州大学是211工程重点建设高校，入选国家双一流建设高校，位于江苏省苏州市，是一所综合类公办本科院校。虽非985，但其医学学科实力在省属高校中位居前列，临床医学 、放射医学等专业具有较高知名度，对四川考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业历来是四川考生的报考热门，临床医学、口腔医学等核心专业竞争尤为激烈。苏州大学地处长三角经济发达地区，地域优势明显。2026年四川省医学类招生计划大幅 缩减，且取消了护理学等相对低分专业，剩余专业均为高门槛医学专业，预计报考竞争将进一步加剧，最低录取位次将较2025年显著提升（位次数字减小）。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合M3供需弹性模型计算及趋势修正，预测2026年苏州大学在四川省医学类最低录取位次约为30758名，较2025年的38241名显著上升（更难进）。预计录取区间为30297至31219 名之间。考生若位次在31000名以内，报考希望较大；位次在32000名以外则需谨慎。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: Soochow University recruits separately for medical programs in Sichuan Province. In 2022, the minimum admission rank was 25876 (planned enrollment 23). In 2023, it rose significantly to 14158 (planned enrollment 25, an increase of 2). In 2025, it dropped sharply to 38241 (planned enrollment 23). The three-year rank fluctuated dramatically, reflecting large annual variations in the popularity of medical programs in Sichuan. In 2026, the total medical enrollment plan decreased from 23 in 2025 to 16, a reduction of approximately 30.4%. Additionally, programs such as Nursing, Preventive Medicine, Chinese Materia Medica, and Medical Laboratory Technology are no longer offered. The remaining programs are concentrated in high-threshold fields such as Clinical Medicine, Stomatology, Medical Imaging, Pharmacy, Radiology, and Forensic Medicine. The significant enrollment reduction combined with the elimination of low-threshold programs will notably raise the minimum admission threshold for medical programs in 2026.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Soochow University is a key university under the national 211 Project and has been selected for the national Double First-Class initiative. It is located in Suzhou, Jiangsu Province, and is a comprehensive public undergraduate institution. Although not a 985 university, its medical disciplines rank among the top provincial universities. Programs such as Clinical Medicine and Radiology are well-known and strongly attract Sichuan candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Program Popularity and Geographic Location
专业热度与地域.text: Medical programs have always been popular among Sichuan candidates, with core programs like Clinical Medicine and Stomatology facing particularly intense competition. Soochow University is located in the economically developed Yangtze River Delta region, offering a clear geographic advantage. In 2026, the medical enrollment plan in Sichuan Province has been significantly reduced, and relatively low-score programs like Nursing have been eliminated. The remaining programs are all high-threshold medical fields. It is expected that competition for admission will further intensify, and the minimum admission rank will rise significantly (i.e., a smaller rank number) compared to 2025.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the M3 supply-demand elasticity model calculation and trend correction, the predicted minimum admission rank for Soochow University's medical programs in Sichuan Province in 2026 is approximately 30758, a significant increase (harder to enter) from 38241 in 2025. The predicted admission range is between 30297 and 31219. Candidates with a rank within 31000 have a good chance of admission; those with a rank beyond 32000 should proceed with caution.

In 2026, low-score programs such as Nursing and Preventive Medicine have been eliminated, raising the overall admission threshold. Therefore, careful evaluation is needed when filling out the application.
